scripts.db:check: corepack pnpm db:lint && corepack pnpm db:reset
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('Minimal lint placeholder: running package-level checks.')" && corepack pnpm -r --if-present lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @payment-divider/core test && corepack pnpm --filter @payment-divider/mobile test && corepack pnpm db:transition-parity
